subject: New Sign-in to Your USF Account
body:
Hello {{participant_fname}},

We noticed a new sign-in to your USF NetID account.

Device: Windows PC
Location: Tampa, FL
Time: {{login_time}}

If this was you, no action is needed. If you don't recognize this activity, change your password through the official USF Account Management portal (netid.usf.edu) or contact the OTS Help Desk.

USF Office of Technology Services
